events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **pass, low risk**. All observed elements meet OSHA 1926 Subpart P requirements — certified/tabulated trench shield for the 6-ft depth, spoil pile setback beyond 2 ft, ladder within the 25-ft egress limit with the minimum required above-grade extension, and a current competent-person inspection log. Only note is to field-verify the ladder's actual 3-ft extension rather than relying on rung count, but nothing here warrants stop-work.
